Why this works

One architect for the entire sale.

A developer's job ends with a beautiful, finished home. Mine begins right there. I design and run the entire system that turns that home into signed contracts: the brand a buyer trusts, the site they land on, the ads that bring them in, the CRM that tracks them, and the sequence that closes them. Not five vendors who never speak to each other. One architect, one connected engine.

01
One system, not five vendorsBrand, site, ads, CRM and close, designed to work as one piece. Nothing leaks through the gaps.
02
Proven on real inventoryLive sites, live ad accounts, real leads and real reservations for working developers. Not a folder of mock-ups.
03
Built to match the buildPremium developments deserve premium demand. Every touchpoint makes a buyer feel the price before they ever see it.
“You build the walls. I build the digital infrastructure that finds the people to live inside them.”
Tomas PaulaitisThe Sales Architect
The full system, in five parts
Foundation→ Operating System→ Presence→ Demand→ Conversion
1Foundation

Brand Foundation

Look like the most expensive option in the room.

Positioning, voice, logo, palette and strategy, then applied across every touchpoint a buyer ever sees. The Level Up Homes welcome pack below is brand work I delivered. It is the standard a buyer feels in their hands before a price is ever mentioned. Trust is built long before the contract.

  • Positioning & messaging
  • Logo & identity
  • Color & type system
  • Branded collateral
Print-ready brand kit
Level Up Homes · branded welcome pack
2Presence

Project Website & Landers

Loads fast, looks like money, captures the lead.

Three project sites already live, each one I built and shipped: Level Up Homes, Solara Pattaya and Gaia Residence. Mobile-first, premium, and engineered so every page routes to one action: inquire. The contact layout below turns a curious visitor into a tracked lead in seconds.

  • Project site
  • Campaign landers
  • Lead-capture forms
  • WhatsApp / LINE routing
Conversion optimizedMobile-firstEN / TH ready
Gaia Residence · live project site
Lead-capture & live listings
3Pipeline

CRM & Sales Pipeline

Every lead tracked from first message to keys in hand.

A ten-stage pipeline, from New Lead to Closed Won, with live deal value visible at every stage. Every lead carries an owner, a tag and a timestamp, so you always know exactly where a buyer sits and what moves them to the next stage. Nothing slips through the cracks, ever.

  • 10-stage pipeline
  • Owner & tags per lead
  • Deal-value tracking
  • Full conversation history
Live opportunity trackingDeal-value tracking
Live pipeline · New Lead to Closed Won
Contact record & conversation thread
4Demand

Paid Media Engine

Demand on tap, Google and Meta working together.

Three months running across Google and Meta: 203k impressions, 10.2k clicks, and 232 leads and chats with a best cost per lead of $7.58. Meta carried the volume. Demand you can turn up or down on command.

  • Google Search & Performance Max
  • Meta (Instagram + Facebook)
  • Creative & copy
  • Audience & retargeting
232 leads in 3 months$7.58 best cost / lead
Google · 3-month traffic
Meta · leads & cost per result
5Speed

Lead Communication System

Reply in seconds, not hours, automatically.

An ad click opens WhatsApp, the lead gets an instant brochure and a tap-to-choose menu: call, viewing, or more info. Behind it, a full nurture flow tags the lead, assigns an owner, and follows up at 24 hours, 48 hours and 7 days. Speed is what wins the deal while the competition is still typing.

  • Instant auto-reply
  • A/B/C choice menus
  • Brochure on demand
  • 24h / 48h / 7-day follow-up
Replies in seconds

I book viewings by hand. A deliberate human touch at the moment that matters most.

Tap-to-choose menu · call / viewing / info
Instant brochure, sent on contact
Full lead-nurture automation
6Trust

Sales Materials & Info Pack

Materials that pre-sell trust.

Brochures, floor plans, pricing and legal, all in one consistent, branded system. The Villa Solara brochure is the benchmark: every page looks like it is worth the asking price. When the materials feel this considered, the buyer assumes the build is too.

  • Project brochure
  • Floor plans & specs
  • Pricing sheets
  • Branded legal docs
Custom-built brochuresFully branded
Editorial spread
Gallery layout

Pages from the Villa Solara brochure. Full document on request.

7The Close

Sales & Closing System

Turn interest into signatures.

Closing is engineered, not left to chance. Tasteful scarcity, clear status signals (Available, Coming Soon, Sold) and decision triggers that move a buyer from interested to signed. Pressure that lands as good timing, never a hard sell. The kind of momentum that carries a project to a sold-out wall.

  • Reservation to SPA to signing flow
  • Scarcity & status signals
  • Decision triggers
  • Contract handling
Proven close rateBuilt for tough markets500+ units closed
Live scarcity block · 60% reserved
8Social

Content & Social Presence

Stay top-of-mind between every touchpoint.

A high-end Instagram grid plus motion. I now turn static villa visualizations into moving reels (see Solara), and produce natural island-flow content for projects like Gaia. Newsletter and founder content keep the brand warm, so that when a buyer is ready, you are the name they already trust.

  • Instagram feed & grid
  • Reels & motion
  • Newsletter
  • Founder content
Stills to reelsCurated grid
Level Up Homes · Instagram grid

10The Engine Room

Operations & Team Structure

One point of accountability for the whole funnel.

Every function that sells your project sits under one roof and one owner: admin, paid media, design, IT, artificial intelligence and sales. You deal with one person who controls the entire process end to end, not a chain of disconnected vendors passing the blame.

  • Admin & coordination
  • Showings & viewings
  • Client relations
  • Ongoing support
One point of contactFunnel fully owned
One owner. Every function. Zero handoffs.
